articles.title: Department of War Releases Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files in Historic Transparency Effort
articles.summary: The Pentagon released a set of previously classified files on unidentified anomalous phenomena, including reports of bright lights, corkscrew‑twisting objects, and a 1972 NASA photo, but the documents contain no evidence of alien technology. In California, the National UFO Reporting Center logged 80 sightings in 2026, ranging from cigar‑shaped objects and rotating flat panels to fireballs and pink‑white orbs, with witnesses describing brief, fast disappearances and unusual flight patterns.

en.title: Department of War Releases Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files in Historic Transparency Effort
en.summary: The Pentagon released a set of previously classified files on unidentified anomalous phenomena, including reports of bright lights, corkscrew‑twisting objects, and a 1972 NASA photo, but the documents contain no evidence of alien technology. In California, the National UFO Reporting Center logged 80 sightings in 2026, ranging from cigar‑shaped objects and rotating flat panels to fireballs and pink‑white orbs, with witnesses describing brief, fast disappearances and unusual flight patterns.

de.title: Das Kriegsministerium veröffentlicht nicht identifizierte Dateien zu anomalen Phänomenen im Rahmen historischer Transparenzbemühungen
de.summary: Das Pentagon veröffentlichte eine Reihe zuvor geheimer Dateien über nicht identifizierte anomale Phänomene, darunter Berichte über helle Lichter, sich drehende Objekte und ein NASA-Foto aus dem Jahr 1972, aber die Dokumente enthalten keine Hinweise auf außerirdische Technologie. In Kalifornien protokollierte das National UFO Reporting Center im Jahr 2026 80 Sichtungen, die von zigarrenförmigen Objekten und rotierenden Flachbildschirmen bis hin zu Feuerbällen und rosa-weißen Kugeln reichten, wobei Zeugen kurzes, schnelles Verschwinden und ungewöhnliche Flugmuster beschrieben.

articles.title: Former Pentagon-Linked Physicist Alleges the United States Has Retrieved Biological Remains From Four Types of Alien Life Forms
articles.summary: Former physicist Dr. Hal Puthoff, who has worked on classified CIA and Pentagon programs, said on The Diary of a CEO podcast that people involved in UFO crash‑retrieval operations claim the United States has recovered at least four distinct species of non‑human beings. Puthoff, 89, has a long history of involvement with intelligence and defense projects, including remote‑viewing research under the Stargate program and later investigations into unidentified aerial phenomena through AAWSAP.

en.title: Former Pentagon-Linked Physicist Alleges the United States Has Retrieved Biological Remains From Four Types of Alien Life Forms
en.summary: Former physicist Dr. Hal Puthoff, who has worked on classified CIA and Pentagon programs, said on The Diary of a CEO podcast that people involved in UFO crash‑retrieval operations claim the United States has recovered at least four distinct species of non‑human beings. Puthoff, 89, has a long history of involvement with intelligence and defense projects, including remote‑viewing research under the Stargate program and later investigations into unidentified aerial phenomena through AAWSAP.

de.title: Ehemaliger mit dem Pentagon verbundener Physiker behauptet, die Vereinigten Staaten hätten biologische Überreste von vier Arten außerirdischer Lebensformen geborgen
de.summary: Der ehemalige Physiker Dr. Hal Puthoff, der an geheimen CIA- und Pentagon-Programmen gearbeitet hat, sagte im Podcast „The Diary of a CEO“, dass an UFO-Absturzbergungsoperationen beteiligte Personen behaupten, die Vereinigten Staaten hätten mindestens vier verschiedene Arten nichtmenschlicher Lebewesen geborgen. Puthoff, 89, ist seit langem an Geheimdienst- und Verteidigungsprojekten beteiligt, darunter Fernbeobachtungsforschung im Rahmen des Stargate-Programms und spätere Untersuchungen zu nicht identifizierten Luftphänomenen durch AAWSAP.

articles.title: How to watch 'Sleeping Dog' online – stream controversial UAP/UFO doc from anywhere
articles.summary: Sleeping Dog is a documentary that follows UFO journalist Jeremy Corbell over a decade of reporting, showing his interviews with figures such as aviator John Lear and physicist Bob Lazar. The film includes Corbell’s own testimony, voicemails, and footage of him dealing with death threats, phone taps, and alleged CIA and FBI surveillance. Corbell’s mother expresses fear that the intelligence agencies have a hit on him, while his mentor George Knapp describes the threats as “over the edge” and notes that Knapp’s phone was tapped.

en.title: How to watch 'Sleeping Dog' online – stream controversial UAP/UFO doc from anywhere
en.summary: Sleeping Dog is a documentary that follows UFO journalist Jeremy Corbell over a decade of reporting, showing his interviews with figures such as aviator John Lear and physicist Bob Lazar. The film includes Corbell’s own testimony, voicemails, and footage of him dealing with death threats, phone taps, and alleged CIA and FBI surveillance. Corbell’s mother expresses fear that the intelligence agencies have a hit on him, while his mentor George Knapp describes the threats as “over the edge” and notes that Knapp’s phone was tapped.

de.title: So schauen Sie sich „Sleeping Dog“ online an – streamen Sie die umstrittene UAP/UFO-Dokumentation von überall aus
de.summary: „Sleeping Dog“ ist ein Dokumentarfilm, der den UFO-Journalisten Jeremy Corbell über ein Jahrzehnt der Berichterstattung begleitet und seine Interviews mit Persönlichkeiten wie dem Flieger John Lear und dem Physiker Bob Lazar zeigt. Der Film enthält Corbells eigene Aussage, Voicemails und Aufnahmen von ihm im Umgang mit Morddrohungen, Telefonabhörungen und angeblicher Überwachung durch CIA und FBI. Corbells Mutter äußert ihre Befürchtung, dass die Geheimdienste ihn angreifen könnten, während sein Mentor George Knapp die Drohungen als „übertrieben“ beschreibt und anmerkt, dass Knapps Telefon abgehört wurde.

articles.title: Alien Whistleblower Claims US Has 'Dismembered Gray Bodies' Hidden Inside Underground Military Bases
articles.summary: S. government has recovered alien bodies and hides them in underground military bases, according to an interview on the platform Redacted. He said that crash‑retrieval operations involving non‑human craft and bodies are conducted outside the oversight of elected officials and are controlled by private aerospace contractors and highly compartmentalised defence programmes.

de.title: Außerirdischer Whistleblower behauptet, die USA hätten „graue Körper zerstückelt“, die in unterirdischen Militärstützpunkten versteckt seien
de.summary: Laut einem Interview auf der Plattform Redacted hat die südafrikanische Regierung außerirdische Leichen geborgen und versteckt sie in unterirdischen Militärbasen. Er sagte, dass Bergungsoperationen nach einem Absturz mit nichtmenschlichen Fahrzeugen und Körpern außerhalb der Aufsicht gewählter Amtsträger durchgeführt würden und von privaten Luft- und Raumfahrtunternehmen und stark abgeschotteten Verteidigungsprogrammen kontrolliert würden.

articles.title: UFO Files Reveal … the Same Old Material
articles.summary: Tokyo is reviewing a set of previously classified Pentagon files on UFO sightings that were released on Friday, which include two videos of unidentified anomalous phenomena near Japan. Chief Cabinet Secretary Minoru Kihara said the Japanese government is actively gathering and analyzing information on incidents that could affect national security, including UAPs. Kihara emphasized that Japan maintains close coordination with the United States and other countries on these matters.

en.title: UFO Files Reveal … the Same Old Material
en.summary: Tokyo is reviewing a set of previously classified Pentagon files on UFO sightings that were released on Friday, which include two videos of unidentified anomalous phenomena near Japan. Chief Cabinet Secretary Minoru Kihara said the Japanese government is actively gathering and analyzing information on incidents that could affect national security, including UAPs. Kihara emphasized that Japan maintains close coordination with the United States and other countries on these matters.

de.title: UFO-Dateien enthüllen … das gleiche alte Material
de.summary: Tokio überprüft eine Reihe zuvor geheimer Pentagon-Dateien über UFO-Sichtungen, die am Freitag veröffentlicht wurden, darunter zwei Videos von nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen in der Nähe von Japan. Der Chefkabinettssekretär Minoru Kihara sagte, die japanische Regierung sammle und analysiere aktiv Informationen über Vorfälle, die die nationale Sicherheit beeinträchtigen könnten, einschließlich UAPs. Kihara betonte, dass Japan in diesen Angelegenheiten eine enge Abstimmung mit den Vereinigten Staaten und anderen Ländern unterhält.

articles.title: Secret agent, who was about to blow the lid off UFO secrets, died 5 years ago. A whistleblower has now raised suspicion
articles.summary: Kevin Childress, a 30‑year Department of Energy criminal investigator, died unexpectedly in 2021 at his Georgia home, with authorities citing complications from COVID‑19. UFO whistleblower Luis Elizondo claims Childress was healthy before his death and had warned that the DOE had a significant role in UAP programs. Elizondo says the DOE is trying to silence him and notes that no public autopsy or detailed cause of death has been released.

en.title: Secret agent, who was about to blow the lid off UFO secrets, died 5 years ago. A whistleblower has now raised suspicion
en.summary: Kevin Childress, a 30‑year Department of Energy criminal investigator, died unexpectedly in 2021 at his Georgia home, with authorities citing complications from COVID‑19. UFO whistleblower Luis Elizondo claims Childress was healthy before his death and had warned that the DOE had a significant role in UAP programs. Elizondo says the DOE is trying to silence him and notes that no public autopsy or detailed cause of death has been released.

de.title: Der Geheimagent, der UFO-Geheimnisse enthüllen wollte, starb vor fünf Jahren. Ein Whistleblower hat nun Verdacht geäußert
de.summary: Kevin Childress, ein 30-jähriger Kriminalermittler des Energieministeriums, starb 2021 unerwartet in seinem Haus in Georgia, wobei die Behörden Komplikationen durch COVID-19 anführten. UFO-Whistleblower Luis Elizondo behauptet, Childress sei vor seinem Tod gesund gewesen und habe gewarnt, dass das DOE eine wichtige Rolle in UAP-Programmen gespielt habe. Elizondo sagt, das Energieministerium versuche ihn zum Schweigen zu bringen und stellt fest, dass weder eine öffentliche Autopsie noch eine detaillierte Todesursache veröffentlicht wurden.

summaries.file-release-department-of-war-releases-: The Pentagon released a set of previously classified files on unidentified anomalous phenomena, including reports of bright lights, corkscrew‑twisting objects, and a 1972 NASA photo, but the documents contain no evidence of alien technology. In California, the National UFO Reporting Center logged 80 sightings in 2026, ranging from cigar‑shaped objects and rotating flat panels to fireballs and pink‑white orbs, with witnesses describing brief, fast disappearances and unusual flight patterns. Specific incidents include a Lake Elsinore resident seeing a floating meteor‑like object that vanished after 30 seconds, a Fresno Zoo observer noting a light that hovered at 200‑300 feet and timed with the International Space Station, and a Mendocino couple witnessing pulsating colored lights that left in a white streak. The Pentagon’s release, described as “new and never‑before‑seen,” is part of a broader declassification effort that has already produced a 2024 report of hundreds of UAP incidents, none of which confirmed extraterrestrial technology. Experts caution that UAP videos are often misinterpreted and that the new files may fuel speculation without further analysis.
summaries.program-former-pentagon-linked-physicist: Former physicist Dr. Hal Puthoff, who has worked on classified CIA and Pentagon programs, said on The Diary of a CEO podcast that people involved in UFO crash‑retrieval operations claim the United States has recovered at least four distinct species of non‑human beings. Puthoff, 89, has a long history of involvement with intelligence and defense projects, including remote‑viewing research under the Stargate program and later investigations into unidentified aerial phenomena through AAWSAP. The claim is presented as a bold addition to a growing pattern of disclosures that suggest governments may secretly possess extraterrestrial evidence. The article notes that this statement has been received as a significant puzzle piece within the disclosure movement, though the broader evidence remains unverified.
summaries.film-how-to-watch-sleeping-dog-online-st: Sleeping Dog is a documentary that follows UFO journalist Jeremy Corbell over a decade of reporting, showing his interviews with figures such as aviator John Lear and physicist Bob Lazar. The film includes Corbell’s own testimony, voicemails, and footage of him dealing with death threats, phone taps, and alleged CIA and FBI surveillance. Corbell’s mother expresses fear that the intelligence agencies have a hit on him, while his mentor George Knapp describes the threats as “over the edge” and notes that Knapp’s phone was tapped. Corbell acknowledges that he does not know what UFOs are and that he is not qualified to answer their significance, yet he continues to pursue the story. The documentary is available on Amazon Prime.
summaries.alien-whistleblower-claims-us-has-dismem: Investigative writer Timothy Alberino claimed that the U.S. government has recovered alien bodies and hides them in underground military bases, according to an interview on the platform Redacted. He said that crash‑retrieval operations involving non‑human craft and bodies are conducted outside the oversight of elected officials and are controlled by private aerospace contractors and highly compartmentalised defence programmes. Alberino referenced anecdotal eyewitness accounts of “gray aliens” at alleged retrieval sites, describing dismembered bodies and transparent fluids, and cited former intelligence official David Grusch’s 2023 testimony that the U.S. had recovered “non‑human biologics.” No publicly available evidence has been produced to substantiate Alberino’s allegations, and U.S. defence agencies have not confirmed the existence of such programmes. Congressional interest in UAP investigations remains high, with lawmakers calling for greater transparency, but the Pentagon maintains that its All‑domain Anomaly Resolution Office has not produced verified evidence of extraterrestrial activity.
summaries.ufo-files-reveal-the-same-old-material: Tokyo is reviewing a set of previously classified Pentagon files on UFO sightings that were released on Friday, which include two videos of unidentified anomalous phenomena near Japan. Chief Cabinet Secretary Minoru Kihara said the Japanese government is actively gathering and analyzing information on incidents that could affect national security, including UAPs. Kihara emphasized that Japan maintains close coordination with the United States and other countries on these matters. When asked whether Japan might release its own UAP files, Kihara said the government would decide on a case‑by‑case basis after weighing factors such as the risk of exposing intelligence‑gathering capabilities. The decision to disclose or keep such files remains uncertain and will depend on comprehensive consideration of various factors.
summaries.secret-agent-who-was-about-to-blow-the-l: Kevin Childress, a 30‑year Department of Energy criminal investigator, died unexpectedly in 2021 at his Georgia home, with authorities citing complications from COVID‑19. UFO whistleblower Luis Elizondo claims Childress was healthy before his death and had warned that the DOE had a significant role in UAP programs. Elizondo says the DOE is trying to silence him and notes that no public autopsy or detailed cause of death has been released. The FBI is investigating a series of missing and dead scientists linked to secret nuclear and UFO programs, including the disappearance of retired General William Neil McCasland. Other scientists, such as David Wilcock, have also died under suspicious circumstances, adding to the pattern of unexplained losses.

en.title: Department of War Releases Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files in Historic Transparency Effort
en.summary: The Pentagon released a set of previously classified files on unidentified anomalous phenomena, including reports of bright lights, corkscrew‑twisting objects, and a 1972 NASA photo, but the documents contain no evidence of alien technology. In California, the National UFO Reporting Center logged 80 sightings in 2026, ranging from cigar‑shaped objects and rotating flat panels to fireballs and pink‑white orbs, with witnesses describing brief, fast disappearances and unusual flight patterns.

de.title: Das Kriegsministerium veröffentlicht nicht identifizierte Dateien zu anomalen Phänomenen im Rahmen historischer Transparenzbemühungen
de.summary: Das Pentagon veröffentlichte eine Reihe zuvor geheimer Dateien über nicht identifizierte anomale Phänomene, darunter Berichte über helle Lichter, sich drehende Objekte und ein NASA-Foto aus dem Jahr 1972, aber die Dokumente enthalten keine Hinweise auf außerirdische Technologie. In Kalifornien protokollierte das National UFO Reporting Center im Jahr 2026 80 Sichtungen, die von zigarrenförmigen Objekten und rotierenden Flachbildschirmen bis hin zu Feuerbällen und rosa-weißen Kugeln reichten, wobei Zeugen kurzes, schnelles Verschwinden und ungewöhnliche Flugmuster beschrieben.

en.title: Former Pentagon-Linked Physicist Alleges the United States Has Retrieved Biological Remains From Four Types of Alien Life Forms
en.summary: Former physicist Dr. Hal Puthoff, who has worked on classified CIA and Pentagon programs, said on The Diary of a CEO podcast that people involved in UFO crash‑retrieval operations claim the United States has recovered at least four distinct species of non‑human beings. Puthoff, 89, has a long history of involvement with intelligence and defense projects, including remote‑viewing research under the Stargate program and later investigations into unidentified aerial phenomena through AAWSAP.

de.title: Ehemaliger mit dem Pentagon verbundener Physiker behauptet, die Vereinigten Staaten hätten biologische Überreste von vier Arten außerirdischer Lebensformen geborgen
de.summary: Der ehemalige Physiker Dr. Hal Puthoff, der an geheimen CIA- und Pentagon-Programmen gearbeitet hat, sagte im Podcast „The Diary of a CEO“, dass an UFO-Absturzbergungsoperationen beteiligte Personen behaupten, die Vereinigten Staaten hätten mindestens vier verschiedene Arten nichtmenschlicher Lebewesen geborgen. Puthoff, 89, ist seit langem an Geheimdienst- und Verteidigungsprojekten beteiligt, darunter Fernbeobachtungsforschung im Rahmen des Stargate-Programms und spätere Untersuchungen zu nicht identifizierten Luftphänomenen durch AAWSAP.

en.title: How to watch 'Sleeping Dog' online – stream controversial UAP/UFO doc from anywhere
en.summary: Sleeping Dog is a documentary that follows UFO journalist Jeremy Corbell over a decade of reporting, showing his interviews with figures such as aviator John Lear and physicist Bob Lazar. The film includes Corbell’s own testimony, voicemails, and footage of him dealing with death threats, phone taps, and alleged CIA and FBI surveillance. Corbell’s mother expresses fear that the intelligence agencies have a hit on him, while his mentor George Knapp describes the threats as “over the edge” and notes that Knapp’s phone was tapped.

de.title: So schauen Sie sich „Sleeping Dog“ online an – streamen Sie die umstrittene UAP/UFO-Dokumentation von überall aus
de.summary: „Sleeping Dog“ ist ein Dokumentarfilm, der den UFO-Journalisten Jeremy Corbell über ein Jahrzehnt der Berichterstattung begleitet und seine Interviews mit Persönlichkeiten wie dem Flieger John Lear und dem Physiker Bob Lazar zeigt. Der Film enthält Corbells eigene Aussage, Voicemails und Aufnahmen von ihm im Umgang mit Morddrohungen, Telefonabhörungen und angeblicher Überwachung durch CIA und FBI. Corbells Mutter äußert ihre Befürchtung, dass die Geheimdienste ihn angreifen könnten, während sein Mentor George Knapp die Drohungen als „übertrieben“ beschreibt und anmerkt, dass Knapps Telefon abgehört wurde.

en.title: Alien Whistleblower Claims US Has 'Dismembered Gray Bodies' Hidden Inside Underground Military Bases
en.summary: S. government has recovered alien bodies and hides them in underground military bases, according to an interview on the platform Redacted. He said that crash‑retrieval operations involving non‑human craft and bodies are conducted outside the oversight of elected officials and are controlled by private aerospace contractors and highly compartmentalised defence programmes.

de.title: Außerirdischer Whistleblower behauptet, die USA hätten „graue Körper zerstückelt“, die in unterirdischen Militärstützpunkten versteckt seien
de.summary: Laut einem Interview auf der Plattform Redacted hat die südafrikanische Regierung außerirdische Leichen geborgen und versteckt sie in unterirdischen Militärbasen. Er sagte, dass Bergungsoperationen nach einem Absturz mit nichtmenschlichen Fahrzeugen und Körpern außerhalb der Aufsicht gewählter Amtsträger durchgeführt würden und von privaten Luft- und Raumfahrtunternehmen und stark abgeschotteten Verteidigungsprogrammen kontrolliert würden.

en.title: UFO Files Reveal … the Same Old Material
en.summary: Tokyo is reviewing a set of previously classified Pentagon files on UFO sightings that were released on Friday, which include two videos of unidentified anomalous phenomena near Japan. Chief Cabinet Secretary Minoru Kihara said the Japanese government is actively gathering and analyzing information on incidents that could affect national security, including UAPs. Kihara emphasized that Japan maintains close coordination with the United States and other countries on these matters.

de.title: UFO-Dateien enthüllen … das gleiche alte Material
de.summary: Tokio überprüft eine Reihe zuvor geheimer Pentagon-Dateien über UFO-Sichtungen, die am Freitag veröffentlicht wurden, darunter zwei Videos von nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen in der Nähe von Japan. Der Chefkabinettssekretär Minoru Kihara sagte, die japanische Regierung sammle und analysiere aktiv Informationen über Vorfälle, die die nationale Sicherheit beeinträchtigen könnten, einschließlich UAPs. Kihara betonte, dass Japan in diesen Angelegenheiten eine enge Abstimmung mit den Vereinigten Staaten und anderen Ländern unterhält.

en.title: Secret agent, who was about to blow the lid off UFO secrets, died 5 years ago. A whistleblower has now raised suspicion
en.summary: Kevin Childress, a 30‑year Department of Energy criminal investigator, died unexpectedly in 2021 at his Georgia home, with authorities citing complications from COVID‑19. UFO whistleblower Luis Elizondo claims Childress was healthy before his death and had warned that the DOE had a significant role in UAP programs. Elizondo says the DOE is trying to silence him and notes that no public autopsy or detailed cause of death has been released.

de.title: Der Geheimagent, der UFO-Geheimnisse enthüllen wollte, starb vor fünf Jahren. Ein Whistleblower hat nun Verdacht geäußert
de.summary: Kevin Childress, ein 30-jähriger Kriminalermittler des Energieministeriums, starb 2021 unerwartet in seinem Haus in Georgia, wobei die Behörden Komplikationen durch COVID-19 anführten. UFO-Whistleblower Luis Elizondo behauptet, Childress sei vor seinem Tod gesund gewesen und habe gewarnt, dass das DOE eine wichtige Rolle in UAP-Programmen gespielt habe. Elizondo sagt, das Energieministerium versuche ihn zum Schweigen zu bringen und stellt fest, dass weder eine öffentliche Autopsie noch eine detaillierte Todesursache veröffentlicht wurden.
